name: happy-path-variant-b
task: Build the CLI entry point for the options backfill. It should support flags for --tickers, --universe, --monthly-only, --max-otm-pct, --resume, and --dry-run. The --resume flag should query ClickHouse for already-ingested contracts and skip them. Add a corresponding justfile recipe.
assertions: Response places the CLI module in `argus-dataplat/src/dataplat/cli/backfill_options.py` following the existing `backfill.py` and `backfill_fundamentals.py` naming pattern
Response calls `ensure_schema()` before any ClickHouse inserts, following the dataplat hard rule
Response implements --resume by querying `SELECT DISTINCT underlying, expiration, strike, put_call FROM option_chains WHERE source = 'thetadata'` and skipping those tuples
Response implements --dry-run by walking the discovery phase (expirations + strikes) without fetching data, printing request count and time estimate
Response adds a `backfill-options` recipe to the justfile using the pattern `uv run python -m dataplat.cli.backfill_options {{ARGS}}`
